title: Company Profile
description: Schema for B2B company profile data including firmographics, funding, and contact info.

name.description: Legal or commonly-used company name. Commonly found in: company profile header, about page, og:site_name meta tag.

domain.description: Primary website domain of the company. Commonly found in: website URL, company profile link, contact page.

description.description: Short description or tagline of the company. Commonly found in: company about section, meta description tag, LinkedIn summary.

founded_year.description: Year the company was founded. Commonly found in: company profile details, about page, LinkedIn company info.

headquarters_city.description: City of the company's headquarters. Commonly found in: contact page, company profile, LinkedIn location field.

headquarters_country.description: Country of the company's headquarters. Commonly found in: contact page, company profile, LinkedIn location field.

employee_count.description: Approximate number of employees. Commonly found in: LinkedIn company stats, company profile details, about page.

employee_range.description: Employee count range band. Commonly found in: LinkedIn company size field, company profile size indicator, data provider.

industry.description: Primary industry of the company. Commonly found in: LinkedIn industry field, company profile, data provider category.

categories.description: List of category or vertical tags for the company. Commonly found in: Crunchbase tags, company profile categories, data provider labels.

funding_stage.description: Latest funding stage of the company. Commonly found in: Crunchbase funding section, company profile funding info, press release.

total_funding_usd.description: Total funding raised in USD. Commonly found in: Crunchbase total funding, company profile funding section, press release.

last_funding_date.description: Date of the most recent funding round. Commonly found in: Crunchbase funding history, latest funding date field, press release date.

investors.description: List of known investors. Commonly found in: Crunchbase investor list, company profile investors section, press release.

revenue_range.description: Estimated annual revenue range. Commonly found in: data provider revenue estimate, company profile revenue field, market research.

is_public.description: Whether the company is publicly traded. Commonly found in: stock ticker presence, SEC filing link, company profile status.

stock_ticker.description: Stock ticker symbol if publicly traded. Commonly found in: company header ticker display, investor relations page, financial data widget.

stock_exchange.description: Stock exchange where the company is listed. Commonly found in: company profile, investor relations page, financial data widget.

linkedin_url.description: LinkedIn company page URL. Commonly found in: company social links, contact page, footer social icons.

twitter_handle.description: Twitter/X handle of the company. Commonly found in: company social links, contact page, footer social icons.

github_org.description: GitHub organization name. Commonly found in: company social links, developer page, open source section.

phone.description: Company main phone number. Commonly found in: contact page, footer, about page.

email.description: Company main contact email. Commonly found in: contact page, footer, about page.

technologies.description: Technologies detected in use by the company. Commonly found in: BuiltWith data, tech stack detection, job postings.

products.description: Names of products or services offered. Commonly found in: products page, navigation menu, company overview.

competitors.description: List of known or identified competitors. Commonly found in: G2 competitors section, Crunchbase similar companies, analyst reports.

page_title.description: Title of the source page. Tabstack auto-fills this from page metadata when left empty.

favicon.description: Favicon URL of the source page. Tabstack auto-fills this from page metadata when left empty.
